reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for scenario proposal/review packet shape and linkage; do not treat this as live chatbot proof or generic audit UI proof.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic scenario proposal packet behavior: attentionView either is a bounded shortlist derived from the ranked proposals or it is not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests and direct scenario propose output: the full ranked proposals list is preserved while attentionView carries bounded selected proposal keys and reasons drawn from that list.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing scenario proposal ranking, attentionView cap, or proposals packet shape.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic scenario conversation-review packet behavior over normalized chatbot summaries and proposal candidates.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests and direct review-conversations output: normalized conversation summaries are linked to scenario proposal summaries, existing coverage hints, and bounded attention reasons without requiring a generic audit UI.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing chatbot normalization, scenario proposal summaries, conversation-review packet shape, or coverage hint semantics.
